task: Parse an AWS CloudFormation template to extract all resource logical IDs and their types
solution_criteria: Function should accept a CloudFormation JSON string and return a dictionary mapping logical IDs to resource types. Must handle nested resources correctly.

task: Create a JSON policy document that allows an IAM role to read and list objects from a specific S3 bucket
solution_criteria: Valid IAM policy JSON with correct Action statements (s3:GetObject, s3:ListBucket), Resource ARNs for the bucket and objects, and proper Effect set to 'Allow'.

task: Write a regex pattern to validate and extract AWS EC2 instance IDs from log files
solution_criteria: Pattern must match valid EC2 instance ID format (i- followed by 17 alphanumeric characters), capture the full instance ID, and avoid false positives on similar-looking strings.
